title: Workspace discovery skips invalid configs
description:
As a Kanbus user
I want workspace discovery to skip invalid .kanbus.yml configs
So that kbs show/list still works for valid projects.

Feature: Workspace discovery tolerates invalid configs

Scenario: Workspace root with one invalid config
  Given a workspace with one valid project and one invalid .kanbus.yml
  When project directories are discovered
  Then the valid project is included
  And discovery does not fail
creator: unknown

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Implementing: workspace discovery now skips invalid .kanbus.yml configs and continues; adding BDD scenario in project_utilities.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: BDD green after adding workspace-invalid-config scenario; discovery now skips invalid configs in workspace mode.
